description: Apply Standard I (Professionalism) — Knowledge of the Law, Independence & Objectivity, Misrepresentation, Misconduct, and Competence — to investment professional conduct

i_a_knowledge_of_law.rule: Understand and comply with all applicable laws, rules, regulations; strictest standard prevails
i_a_knowledge_of_law.dissociation: Must dissociate from illegal or unethical activity

i_b_independence_objectivity.rule: Use reasonable care and judgement; reject or limit gifts and compensation that compromise independence
i_b_independence_objectivity.modest_gifts: Token, customary gifts acceptable with disclosure

i_c_misrepresentation.rule: No false or misleading statements in analysis, recommendations, marketing

i_d_misconduct.rule: No dishonesty, fraud, deceit; no conduct that reflects adversely on professional reputation

i_e_competence.rule: Act with, and maintain, the competence necessary to fulfil professional responsibilities

violations_examples.i_a: Failing to report violation by colleague
violations_examples.i_e: Taking on complex mandate without requisite expertise

validation.valid_substandard: substandard in [i_a, i_b, i_c, i_d, i_e]

errors.message: substandard must be i_a, i_b, i_c, i_d, or i_e

anti_patterns.rule: Do not claim local law supersedes Standard I when local law is laxer
anti_patterns.why: Standard I(A) requires the stricter of CFA Standard and local law; laxity is no defence

anti_patterns.rule: Do not accept 'small' gifts without disclosure
anti_patterns.why: Any gift that influences perception of independence must be disclosed; scale is not the sole test

anti_patterns.rule: Do not confuse personal integrity with professional competence
anti_patterns.why: Standard I(E) is a separate duty — honest but under-qualified work still violates the standard

goals.description: Apply Standard I (Professionalism) — Knowledge of the Law, Independence & Objectivity, Misrepresentation, Misconduct, and Competence — to investment professional conduct

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details
